sn38.4:1.1: "For what purpose, friend Sāriputta, is the holy life lived under the ascetic Gotama?"
sn38.4:1.2: "It is, friend, for the full understanding of suffering that the holy life is lived under the Blessed One."
sn38.4:1.3: "But, friend, is there a path, is there a way for the full understanding of this suffering?"
sn38.4:2.1: "There is a path, friend, there is a way …sn.iv.254this Noble Eightfold Path … ."
